title: valvaria ochroleuca
intro: Valvaria ochroleuca, also known as the yellow waxy cap, is a species of fungus belonging to the family of opilioid families. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Valvaria ochroleuca include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this fungus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
